source: logged-in H1 Opportunity Discovery + policy/scope page via Kali/noVNC CDP visible text
boundary: Non-authoritative note. Machine-enforced program scope is programs/<program-slug>/scope.json plus config/scope.txt.
signals: Dedicated bug-bounty environment with only three explicit in-scope assets.

In-scope REST API, dashboard URL, and API host map directly to auth-role, removed/downgraded stale access, API/UI mismatch, and owned-object IDOR bundles.
Gold Standard, response efficiency 98%, launched May 2025, overview updated Apr 6 2026; 90-day reports/bounties show activity.
No phone/payment/KYC gate observed in policy text; email confirmation remains operator/human gate.
blocked_before: API token/webhook/integration actions remain separate explicit gates
no automated scanners; no SSRF per policy
